name: Sausage Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. BREAK EGGS INTO A SMALL BOWL. ADD WATER AND BEAT UNTIL YOLKS AND WHITES ARE JUST MIXED.
2. IN AN OMELET PAN WITH NON-STICK SURFACE PREFERRED, MELT BUTTER AND PEANUT OIL OVER MEDIUM HIGH HEAT.
3. WHEN BUTTER ALMOST STOPS BUBBLING, POUR EGGS ALL AT ONCE INTO THE PAN.
4. USING A SPATULA, GENTLY PUSH EGG FROM THE EDGES AS IT STARTS TO SET.
5. TILT THE PAN TO LET THE UNBOILED EGGS RUN UNDER THE EDGES.
6. COOK UNTIL DESIRED HARDNESS (OMELETS SHOULD NOT BE COOKED UNTIL COMPLETELY HARD).
7. REMOVE FROM HEAT AND ADD PRECOOKED SAUSAGE OVER HALF THE OMELET.
8. GENTLY SLIDE THE EGG SLOWLY ONTO A PLATE, THEN TILT THE PAN TO FOLD THE OMELET IN HALF.
